nasb.text: After whom has the king of Israel come out? Whom are you pursuing? A dead dog, a single flea?

esv.text: After whom has the king of Israel come out? After whom do you pursue? After a dead dog! After a flea!

cnv.text: 以色列的王出去追捕誰呢？你現在追趕誰呢？不過是追趕一條死狗，一隻跳蚤罷了！

ccb.text: 以色列王出来要捉拿谁呢？一条死狗吗？一只跳蚤吗？
